hooks.command: [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-option -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_state running \; select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" -P bg=colour17 2>/dev/null || true
[ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-option -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_state running \; select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" -P bg=colour17 2>/dev/null || true
[ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-option -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_state waiting \; select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" -P bg=#2a1e1e 2>/dev/null || true
[ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-option -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" @claude_state done \; select-pane -t "$TMUX_PANE" -P bg=default 2>/dev/null || true
